# Pandoc

Pandoc is a universal document converter that can read and write dozens of markup and document formats, including Markdown, HTML, LaTeX, DOCX, PDF (via LaTeX), EPUB, and more. It is often used as the "Swiss-army knife" of document conversion.

## References

- [Pandoc Website](https://pandoc.org/)
- [Pandoc User Guide](https://pandoc.org/MANUAL.html)
- [Docker Hub - pandoc/extra](https://hub.docker.com/r/pandoc/core)
